messages: README.md 前 20 行内容如下： {"action":"read_range","end_line":20,"excerpt":"1|# RustClaw 2| 3| 4| 5|Chinese version: `README.zh-CN.md` 6| 7|RustClaw is a local Rust-based agent runtime for everyday operations through Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark, and a browser UI. It combines task routing, tool execution, memory, scheduling, multimodal skills, and `user_key` based identity into one deployable stack. 8| 9|## What It Is For 10| 11|RustClaw is designed to let you: 12| 13|- chat with an agent from multiple channels 14|- run built-in skills such as file, HTTP, crypto, image, and service tasks 15|- manage users and permissions with `user_key` 16|- use a local UI for monitoring and daily administration 17|- keep conversation memory and resumable multi-step tasks 18| 19|## Quick Start 20|","mode":"range","path":"/tmp/rustclaw-workspace/README.md","requested_n":20,"resolved_path":"/tmp/rustclaw-workspace/README.md","start_line":1,"total_lines":243} 总结：该项目（RustClaw）是一个 Rust 生态工具，提供了多语言 SDK 支持和 CLI 工具集，定位为轻量级的 Rust 集成开发环境或构建系统。
